task_completion.description: Verify that a Copyright Profile named 'TechCorpLicense' was created in Android Studio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Android Studio Settings/Preferences -> Editor -> Copyright -> Copyright Profiles, there should be a profile listed named exactly 'TechCorpLicense'.

task_completion.description: Verify the exact copyright text is configured in the 'TechCorpLicense' profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text box for the 'TechCorpLicense' profile must contain: 'Copyright (C) 2025 TechCorp Inc.', 'All rights reserved.', and 'Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'TechCorpLicense' is set as the default project copyright profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Android Studio Settings/Preferences -> Editor -> Copyright, the 'Default project copyright' dropdown should be set to 'TechCorpLicense'.

task_completion.description: Verify the copyright header is applied to the Kotlin file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: MainActivity.kt should be open in the editor, showing the configured copyright header as a comment block at the very top of the file.

task_completion.description: Verify the copyright header is applied to the XML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: activity_main.xml should be open in the editor, showing the configured copyright header as an XML comment block (<!-- ... -->) at the top of the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Android Studio to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Android Studio IDE interface being used to configure settings and view files, rather than a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass IDE configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing commands like 'sed', 'echo', or 'cat' being used to bulk-insert headers or modify IDE configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the correct project is open in Android Studio.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Android Studio project explorer or window title should clearly indicate that the 'TechCorpApp' project is open.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Directory: /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/TechCorpApp. Profile Name: 'TechCorpLicense'. Expected Copyright Text: 'Copyright (C) 2025 TechCorp Inc.', 'All rights reserved.', and 'Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.'. Target files to check for headers: app/src/main/java/com/example/techcorpapp/MainActivity.kt and app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml.
